metadata.track_name: 为 AIAgent 添加 thread goal runtime
metadata.goal: 实现与 Codex 同等级的 thread goal 能力：/goal 用户入口、goal tools、持久化状态、自动计费、idle continuation、complete/blocked 审计和状态同步。
metadata.description: 为本项目补齐与 Codex 同等级的 thread goal 能力：/goal 入口、goal tools、持久化状态、自动计费与 idle continuation、complete/blocked 审计和用户可见状态同步。

phase.name: Goal model and persistence
phase.goal: 建立 thread goal 数据模型、存储边界和最小可验证测试。

task.name: Define goal schema and storage contract
task.description: Define the persisted goal shape, statuses, budget/usage fields, and thread-scoped repository contract.

task.name: Implement goal persistence and state transitions
task.description: Implement storage, retrieval, replace/update/clear flows, and persisted-thread guardrails.

phase.name: Slash command and tool surface
phase.goal: 提供 `/goal` 用户入口以及 get/create/update goal 模型工具。

task.name: Add slash and tool contract tests
task.description: Cover `/goal` parse forms, replacement confirmation, and goal tool schema/permission expectations.

task.name: Implement goal command and tool handlers
task.description: Wire `/goal` actions and register model-callable goal tools in the builtin tool set.

phase.name: Runtime accounting and auto continuation
phase.goal: 把 goal 连接到 turn 生命周期、usage accounting、budget limit 和 idle continuation。

task.name: Add runtime accounting and continuation tests
task.description: Cover turn start/finish, tool completion, abort, budget exhaustion, and idle continuation behavior.

task.name: Implement goal runtime hooks and hidden prompts
task.description: Compute usage deltas, maintain runtime goal state, and inject continuation / budget prompts when required.

phase.name: Status propagation and final verification
phase.goal: 让 goal 状态对用户可见，并完成最终验证与 gap-loop 收口。

task.name: Add state propagation and audit tests
task.description: Cover goal update events, UI/status visibility, and strict complete/blocked audit outcomes.

task.name: Wire status surface and run targeted verification
task.description: Connect the goal state to user-visible surfaces and run targeted verification for the new capability.
